content_type: designed graphic with embedded Truth Social post
description: Vertical White House graphic on a dark background. The top two-thirds is a photograph of Donald Trump walking through a White House hallway: he wears a navy-blue suit jacket, white shirt, bright red tie and an American-flag lapel pin, looking at the camera with a softly blurred ornate interior behind him. Overlaid across his torso in large white serif all-caps with a slight outline is the text 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE!'. Below that is a white rounded-rectangle card styled as a Truth Social post: a small circular flag-painted Trump avatar, bold black name 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta verified badge and the black Truth Social square badge, the grey handle '@realDonaldTrump', and body text reading: 'I have just read the response from Iran's so-called "Representatives." I don't like it, TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP', with the phrase 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE!' highlighted in yellow. At the bottom center is the engraved White House building logo and 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark.
notable_text: TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE! | I have just read the response from Iran's so-called 'Representatives.' I don't like it — TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP
